title: stipa capillacea
intro: Stipa capillacea, also known as needle grass or blue grama, is a perennial grass species native to the Great Plains of North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Stipa capillacea include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting immune function. Stipa capillacea can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in herbal supplements to support overall well-being.
